title: Department Manager Vacancy at Zara India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Zara India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!
